metadata.description: AI Telemetry Platform demo dataset (GitHub Issue #34). One record per AI operation, attributed down the platform hierarchy (client → program → engagement → requirement/control/evidence) using only record ids that exist in this demo dataset. The schema is the complete Release 2 telemetry contract; fields not yet exercised by Release 1 remain present for forward compatibility. All aggregation (daily/weekly/monthly, per scope, ROI) is derived from these records — nothing is hardcoded in the UI.
